apiError.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
apiError.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
apiError.VALIDATION_ERROR: The data you sent is invalid. Check the highlighted fields.
apiError.UNAUTHORIZED: You need to sign in to do this.
apiError.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do this.
apiError.NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
apiError.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again in a moment.
apiError.NETWORK_ERROR: We couldn't reach the server. Please try again.
apiError.LIMIT_REACHED: You've reached your plan's limit. Upgrade to continue.
apiError.CONFLICT: The resource conflicts with the current state.
apiError.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: This service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.
apiError.NEWSLETTER_NOT_CONFIGURED: The newsletter isn't available right now. We're working on bringing it back.
apiError.INVALID_EMAIL_OR_PASSWORD: The email address or password is incorrect.
apiError.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Your account is temporarily locked due to too many failed login attempts. Please try again in a few minutes or use the password recovery option.
apiError.INVALID_PAGINATION_PARAMS: The pagination parameters are not valid.
apiError.NOT_IMPLEMENTED: This feature is not available yet.
apiError.CONFIGURATION_ERROR: There is a configuration issue. Please try again in a few minutes.
apiError.QUOTA_EXCEEDED: You have reached the allowed limit for this action.
apiError.ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED: Your plan does not include this feature. Upgrade to continue.
apiError.PROVIDER_ERROR: The payment service returned an unexpected error. Please try again in a few minutes.
apiError.PROVIDER_RATE_LIMITED: The payment service is busy. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
apiError.PROVIDER_TIMEOUT: The payment service took too long to respond. Please try again.
apiError.PLAN_DISABLED: The selected plan is no longer available. Please choose a different plan to continue.

sitemap.title: Sitemap
sitemap.description: Hospeda sitemap. Quickly find all pages, accommodations, destinations, events and resources available on our platform
